calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Compliance
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Gilbert Jay appearing for co-administrator Elizabeth Cranke. Counsel is requesting the court to set aside and vacate the prior order. He has filed a supplemental declaration. Court has not read the counsel's declaration and supplemental declaration. Court will vacate the prior order after reading the two declarations. Matter submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Compliance
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Aug-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jul-03-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Gilbert Jay appearing for and with Elizabeth Cranke. Mr. Rosenblatt and his attorney Mr. Siedenfeld are not in court. Mr. Jay informs the court that Mr. Seidenfeld has no objection to this petition. Court does not have the authority to order one administrator to do this. Under 9630, the Court can order both administators to sell the property. If Mr. Rosenblatt does not comply, the Court will suspend his powers and Ms. Cranke can act alone. Court is setting a status for compliance on 8/7. Court will draft the order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
